expectations.evidence: Lines 5-21: Displays 'Welcome to AWP RootNet!' with protocol description and usage guidance.
Lines 25-33: Step 1 reads local skill version 1.1.0 and curls remote SKILL.md to compare versions.
Lines 84-86: Runs 'awp-wallet balance --token {T} --chain bsc' and reports BNB balance as 0.
Line 90: 'No BNB → Gasless Relay 路径' — explicitly chooses gasless relay path due to zero BNB.
Lines 145-146: Register type includes {"name": "nonce", "type": "uint256"} and message includes nonce value.
Lines 219-220: Bind type includes {"name": "nonce", "type": "uint256"} and message includes nonce value.
Line 172: 'curl -X POST .../relay/register' with user, deadline, and signature payload.
Line 246: 'curl -X POST .../relay/bind' with agent, principal, deadline, and signature payload.
Lines 302-328: Step 11 fetches skillsURI via /subnets/1/skills, downloads SKILL.md, and installs it to skills/awp-subnet-1/.
